---
name: Prompt issue
about: Report an unsafe, ambiguous, or ineffective workflow behavior
title: "prompt: "
labels: bug
---

## Workflow

Which prompt or skill is affected?

## Observed behavior

What did the agent do or fail to do?

## Expected behavior

What would have been safe and useful instead?

## Safe reproduction

Include a non-sensitive example. Do not paste credentials, private URLs, or production data.
